ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector where the stock belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the stock is delisted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the recorded time */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume at the recorded time */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock at the recorded time */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock at the recorded time */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock at the recorded time */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock at the recorded time */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor applied to the price */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the price data is obtained from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price_above, price_below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value for the alert condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the alert is active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "price_at_trigger" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of trigger */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_message" TEXT /* Message related to the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock record */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the transaction log */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
